name: stitch-luxury-design-digital-showroom
description: Monorepo root for trilingual luxury interior & furniture showroom

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend "cd backend && npm run dev" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.mjs"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
